status: real TESS injection/recovery calibration; not a discovery search
interpretation: The 500-2000 ppm grid is still saturated on these bright two-minute TESS products. A deeper threshold experiment at 50-200 ppm is required.
caveats: These three bright stars do not represent the full TESS magnitude and variability distribution.
Perfect recovery at 500 ppm does not imply Earth-analog sensitivity across the survey.
Brightening controls are empirical background references, not labels for false alarms.
